# /plan

> L1-L4 work breakdown for the F&O feature, with L2/L3/L4 ids using the F&O object-id prefixes (EXT/BDC/OPR/INT/DEN/SEC/WFL).

## Usage

```
/plan [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/spec.md` (`SPEC_APPROVED` APPROVED)
- [templates/plan.template.md](../../templates/plan.template.md)
- [constitution/03-object-type-standards.md](../../constitution/03-object-type-standards.md) (10 categories drive L2 grouping)
- [constitution/07-alm-configuration.md](../../constitution/07-alm-configuration.md) (work-item hierarchy + field map)

## Hierarchy

- **L1 Epic** — one per feature (Title = `[FO] {feature} — {one-line goal}`)
- **L2 Feature/Capability** — one per object-type category in scope (Extensions / Business Documents / Operations / Integration / Data Entities / Security / Workflows / Reports / Power Platform / Retail)
- **L3 User Story** — one per spec FR-NN
- **L4 Task** — implementation atom 3-8h with object-id prefix (e.g., `EXT-12 — CoC method MyContoso.PostInvoice.run`)

## Execution flow

1. Generate L1 from spec §1.
2. Generate L2 by walking spec §5 (Object-type scope) → one L2 per category.
3. Generate L3 from spec §3 FRs.
4. Generate L4 placeholders from spec §3 ACs + §5 object-types. Each L4 carries an object-id (EXT-NN / BDC-NN / OPR-NN / INT-NN / DEN-NN / SEC-NN / WFL-NN).
5. Render plan.md with `<TBD>` markers where input was incomplete; `/clarify` resolves them.
6. `currentStates += PLAN_DRAFT`; gate `PLAN_CLARIFIED.status=PENDING`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/plan.md`
